text: Evaluate stronger model-backed Node embeddings beyond the hashed local default
description: The default local architecture now uses a deterministic in-process Node embedding generator to avoid requiring Python. Decide whether future local releases should adopt a higher-quality Node-native model-backed embedding path for better semantic search, and what dependency/runtime tradeoff is acceptable.

status.comment: Not a release blocker. The current hashed local embedding path is acceptable for the open-source local-first release, but model quality and dependency cost need a deliberate product/engineering decision.
